title: Rarer Heavy Core
description: Heavy core is already one of the rarest items in the game, but this datapack makes it even rarer
body:
### Heavy Core Drop Rate Changes

**Vanilla (Default):**
> Heavy Cores have a 7.5% drop chance from an Ominous Vault.
> 
> On average, that means you’ll get one about every 13–14 vaults.

### With My Datapack:
> Heavy Cores now have a 4% drop chance.
> 
> On average, you’ll get one about every 25 vaults.
> 
> This makes Heavy Cores significantly rarer and more valuable compared to vanilla.
